summary: Iteration 71 - PDF/Excel Export for Members List and Navbar coop_name Display. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Export dropdown with Excel/PDF options works correctly, files download successfully. Dashboard header shows 'Coopérative Bielaghana' confirming coop_name is displayed for cooperative users.
critical_code_review_comments: cooperative_members.py: Export route /members/export correctly placed BEFORE /members/{member_id} to avoid route shadowing
cooperative_members.py: _export_xlsx() uses openpyxl with proper styling (green header #2D5A4D, title row with coop name/code)
cooperative_members.py: _export_pdf() uses reportlab with landscape A4, proper table styling, and member count footer
cooperative_members.py: Export supports status and search filters via query params
Navbar.jsx: 3 locations updated to show coop_name for cooperative users (desktop button, dropdown, mobile menu)
MembersPage.jsx: Export dropdown with data-testid attributes for Excel and PDF buttons
MembersPage.jsx: handleExport() fetches file via fetch API and triggers download
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export functionality complete: 1) GET /api/cooperative/members/export?format=xlsx returns valid Excel file with PK magic bytes. 2) GET /api/cooperative/members/export?format=pdf returns valid PDF file with %PDF magic bytes. 3) Both support status and search query params. 4) Invalid format (e.g., csv) returns 422. 5) Unauthenticated requests return 403. 6) Navbar shows coop_name for cooperative users in desktop header, dropdown, and mobile menu. Orange Money and SMS remain MOCKED.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

export_xlsx.GET /api/cooperative/members/export?form: PASS - Returns valid XLSX file (PK magic bytes)

export_pdf.GET /api/cooperative/members/export?form: PASS - Returns valid PDF file (%PDF magic bytes)

navbar_coop_name.Login response includes coop_name: PASS - User data contains coop_name field

navbar_coop_name.implementation: Navbar.jsx updated in 3 locations to show user.coop_name || user.full_name for cooperative users
